task_completion.description: Open the srtm_dem.tif file in SNAP Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SNAP Desktop application is open with 'srtm_dem.tif' listed in the Product Explorer window or displayed in the main image view.

task_completion.description: Produce a terrain steepness (slope) analysis layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new band or product representing slope or steepness (e.g., named 'slope', 'steepness', or similar) is visible in the Product Explorer, or a slope calculation dialog/result is shown.

task_completion.description: Produce a classification layer for construction difficulty zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new band, mask, or product representing classified zones (e.g., named 'difficulty', 'zones', 'class', or created via Band Maths/Classification tools) is visible in the Product Explorer or displayed as a categorized map in the image view.

task_completion.description: Save the analysis in BEAM-DIMAP format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product' dialog showing the BEAM-DIMAP format (.dim extension), or the Product Explorer showing the saved product name without the [modified] asterisk, or a file manager showing the newly created .dim file and .data folder.

task_completion.description: Export the assessment as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog in SNAP showing the GeoTIFF format and the destination path '/home/ga/snap_exports/', or a terminal/file manager showing the exported .tif file located inside the /home/ga/snap_exports/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the SNAP Desktop GUI to perform the analysis rather than relying solely on command-line tools or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with SNAP Desktop menus, dialogs (like Band Maths, Export, or DEM tools), and image views.

integrity.description: The generated slope and classification layers contain genuine spatial data.
integrity.visual_evidence: When displayed in the image view, the slope and classification layers show actual map-like terrain variations or distinct colored zones, rather than being completely blank, uniform, or text.

integrity.description: The agent exported the GeoTIFF directly from SNAP rather than just copying the original file via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SNAP Export dialog is used to create the GeoTIFF, or the final GeoTIFF file size/contents differ from the original DEM, proving it contains the analysis.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The data file is located at the absolute path: /home/ga/snap_data/srtm_dem.tif.
